title: My dad dead 10:22 pm Augusta 24th ??? — premonition #1
html:
TL;DR

  • Title-as-content note from late August 2019: "My dad dead 10:22 pm Augusta 24th ???". Body is empty; the title with three question marks is the entire note.
  • First of three dated dad death premonition entries from 2019 — followed by 10 27 car crash version and 12 22 crashes tonight version.
  • The specificity is the data: a time (10:22 pm), a place ("Augusta 24th" — likely Augusta St. or a misspelling of August 24th, written the day after), and three question marks marking the teen's did-I-just-receive-this uncertainty.
  • Sits one day before the dream of dad's key + Native American certificates + $1000 bills — same 48-hour window, same paternal-death-and-inheritance substrate.
  • Earliest extant dread-as-data note in the corpus; rhymes forward to the heightened perception cluster.

Notes

The note's mechanic is haunting. Date-stamped 2019-08-25 05:22 UTC (which converts to 2019-08-24 10:22 pm Pacific) — meaning the title's "10:22 pm Augusta 24th" is the timestamp of the note itself. Yahir wrote the words "my dad dead" at the exact moment he claims his dad died, then added three question marks. The note IS the premonition — written in the present tense, marked with the moment-of-occurrence, then queried.

The "Augusta" string is ambiguous: could be a misspelling of August, could be Augusta Street (a GP street name), could be a confused phoneticization of something heard. The vault doesn't yet have enough context to disambiguate, but the "24th" aligns with the August-24 timestamp.

Dad did not die that night. But the next-day dream (key + certificates + $1000 bills) is a paternal-inheritance dream, and the 1-month-later show dad all the documents note has Yahir doing real-world inheritance-prep. The teen brain is processing something that hadn't happened yet but felt like it had.

This is one of three dated 2019 premonitions; together they form the premonition arc that becomes a first-class cluster.

Privacy note

Discloses paternal-death anxiety in the late-teen voice; preserved because it's load-bearing for the arc.

Connections

  • 2019 08 26 dream of dads key — next-day dream sibling
  • 2019 10 27 car crash with dad premonition — premonition #2
  • 2019 12 22 dad dies it crashes tonight — premonition #3
  • dad yahir · dad death premonitions · heightened perception trigger · lineage as fate
  • grants pass or · grants pass teen era
